plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Perfect for small teams and startups just getting started.
plans.billing: Monthly or annual (10% discount on annual).
plans.trial: 14-day free trial, no credit card required.

plans.name: Growth
plans.description: For growing businesses that need more power and collaboration.
plans.billing: Monthly or annual (15% discount on annual).
plans.support: Priority support with 12-hour response time, live chat.
plans.trial: 14-day free trial, no credit card required.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.annual_price: Custom pricing available for multi-year contracts.
plans.description: For large organizations with enterprise-grade security and compliance requirements.
plans.billing: Annual billing required. Custom pricing available for large deployments.
plans.support: 24/7 dedicated support with 1-hour SLA, dedicated Slack channel, onboarding specialist.
plans.trial: Custom POC (proof of concept) available upon request.

faq.question: Can I switch plans?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Charges are prorated automatically.

faq.question: Is there a free trial?
faq.answer: Yes, all plans (Starter and Growth) come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required. Enterprise customers can request a custom POC.

faq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), ACH bank transfers, and invoice-based payments for Enterprise plans.

faq.question: Does the Enterprise plan include SSO?
faq.answer: Yes. The Enterprise plan includes full SSO support via SAML 2.0 and OAuth, Active Directory/LDAP integration, and 2FA enforcement.

faq.question: What is the uptime SLA?
faq.answer: Starter: 99.5%, Growth: 99.9%, Enterprise: 99.99% with financial penalty clauses for downtime.

faq.question: Do you offer discounts for nonprofits or startups?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer 30% discounts for verified nonprofits and early-stage startups (under $1M ARR). Contact sales@company.com for details.

faq.question: What is the refund policy?
faq.answer: We offer a full refund within 30 days of purchase if you are not satisfied. Annual plans are refunded pro-rata.

faq.question: Is there an on-premise deployment option?
faq.answer: Yes, on-premise deployment is available exclusively on the Enterprise plan. Contact our sales team for infrastructure requirements.
